description: Detects virtual methods in derived classes without the override specifier in C++. Simplified from Rust: flags all function_definition nodes inside class_specifier bodies that have a base_class_clause parent (info severity), without filtering by virtual keyword, destructor, pure virtual, or NOLINT suppression. Higher false-positive rate -- all class methods are flagged.

flag.message: Method in class body detected -- verify virtual methods in derived classes have the 'override' specifier
